name: Migrate kiosks from global.info → Firestore 'kiosks' collection
info:
Reads global.info, remaps stationids to USB/CAB/FRB prefix format,
normalises field names to match the old kiosk schema, then writes
each kiosk as a document in the Firestore 'kiosks' collection.

Requires: node-red-contrib-google-cloud-firestore
Key file:  /home/george/firestore/firestore-key.json

name: Transform Kiosk IDs & Fields
Add Legacy Aggregate Fields
